narratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western and European sanctions as ineffective and a failure, portraying Western diplomatic efforts as weak and unsuccessful in achieving their stated goal of stopping Putin.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
narratives.reasoning: The statement highlights a specific adverse outcome (energy crisis) for European countries as a direct consequence of the war and their own policies, emphasizing the negative impact on Western interests.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है... यूक्रेन को भी भ्रष्टाचार के जांच को लेकर मिलिट्री अधिकारियों के देश छोड़ने पर रोक लगानी पड़ी।
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Ukraine of large-scale corruption and malpractice in military procurement, undermining the integrity and effectiveness of its institutions during the war.

narratives.evidence_quote: रूस को हैकिंग के मामले में महारत हासिल है और यूक्रेन युद्ध में उसने बखूबी इसका इस्तेमाल भी किया।
narratives.reasoning: The statement praises Russia's cyber warfare capabilities, describing its skill as 'महारत हासिल' (mastery) and its effective use ('बखूबी') in the conflict, which is a positive evaluation of its military actions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, portraying Western coercive measures as ineffective and weak.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: मसलन, शुरुआती दौर में देखा गया कि कई यूरोपीय देशों ने रूस पर दबाव बनाने के नजरिए से पश्चिमी खेमे में चले गए लेकिन तुरंत ही उन्हें ऊर्जा संकट ने घेर लिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote suggests that European countries initially joined the Western bloc to pressure Russia but were immediately hit by an energy crisis, implying that their unity and commitment were fragile and self-interest-driven, highlighting division and vulnerability within Europe.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने जब यूक्रेन पर हमले किए, तो पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय देशों में एक आत्ममुग्धता का भाव था, जिससे वे यह समझकर चल रहे थे कि पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the West's initial reaction to the invasion as one of self-absorbed arrogance, assuming global support for its pressure campaign on Putin, which failed. This implies the West's actions were based on its own geopolitical calculations and assumptions of leadership, rather than a primary concern for Ukraine's fate.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement supports the parent narrative of discrediting Western diplomacy by suggesting the US has 'washed its hands' of the situation (a gesture of giving up or disengaging), portraying it as abandoning or failing Ukraine, which is a distinct theme not fully captured by the other specific subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which is a core argument for the 'sanctions will backfire' subnarrative, as it highlights the ineffectiveness and futility of the West's primary punitive measure.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes a specific negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis) caused by the conflict and the West's own actions (joining the Western bloc to pressure Russia). It supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the 'sanctions backfire' or 'refugee flows' definitions, as it focuses on energy dependency and economic shock.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेनी सेना के मैन पावर पांच लाख का है लेकिन इससे चार गुना बड़ी रूसी सेना के सामने वे दो साल से टिके हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the Ukrainian military's survival not as resilience but as a surprising anomaly against a vastly superior force, subtly undermining its capability and effectiveness by implying it should have been defeated.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन इस मामले में पूरी तरह से पश्चिमी देशों पर निर्भर है
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly claims Ukraine is completely dependent on Western countries for military equipment, supporting the narrative that Ukraine is not an independent actor but a client state of the West.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में मिलिट्री इक्वीपमेंट्स की खरीद-फरोख्त में बड़ी धांधली हुई है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote alleges large-scale corruption in Ukraine's military procurement, directly aiming to delegitimize the government and its officials by portraying them as corrupt and incompetent.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: युद्ध तीसरे साल में प्रवेश कर गया है लेकिन युद्धविराम की कोई संभावना नजर नहीं आती. इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This passage paints a bleak picture of the conflict with no prospect for ceasefire and portrays Ukraine as clinging to false hope while its main supporter (the US) appears to be standing aside, suggesting a hopeless situation with no positive resolution in sight.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Praise of Russian military might
subnarratives.evidence_quote: तकनीकी रूप से मजबूत, लंबी दूरी और अत्याधुनिक हथियारों से लैस रूसी सेना
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the technological strength, long-range capabilities, and modern weaponry of the Russian military, fitting the definition of highlighting Russia's military institutions and equipment positively.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पूरी दुनिया पुतिन पर दबाव बनाने में पश्चिम का साथ देंगी, लेकिन ऐसा नहीं हुआ. मसलन, ग्लोबल साउथ, भारत, चीन और दक्षिण अफ्रीका और अन्य देशों ने अपनी प्राथमिकताओं को अहम माना.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement emphasizes that many countries (Global South, India, China, South Africa) did not join Western pressure on Putin, implying significant international support or at least non-opposition for Russia's position, aligning with the narrative of Russia's popularity on the international stage.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement supports the parent narrative by portraying Russia as resilient and successful in withstanding Western economic pressure, which is a form of praise for Russia's strategic and economic strength, but it does not fit neatly into any of the other specific subnarrative definitions provided.
